name: Turkey Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the cooked turkey.
2. Cook thin spaghetti according to package directions.
3. Make the white sauce (see Micro Cookbook recipe).
4. In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over low heat.
5. Add garlic, celery, green pepper, and mushrooms; cook until tender.
6. Stir in tomato puree, chicken bouillon cube, basil, salt, and pepper to taste. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Spread half the white sauce in a casserole dish.
8. Layer half of the cooked spaghetti and the tomato mixture with the turkey.
9. Repeat the layers.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
